reviews.text:
Subject: Acknowledgment of Exceptional Advocacy for Human Rights and Anti-Corruption Efforts

Dear John,

It is a rare occasion for me to publicly endorse legal professionals; however, exceptional individuals who exemplify unwavering dedication to human rights advocacy do warrant recognition. In a world where the fight for justice and integrity is paramount, we are in dire need of more individuals who are willing to stand up for what is right.

I would like to take this opportunity to express my sincere gratitude for your relentless efforts in championing the cause of citizens and confronting the pervasive challenges of corruption and human rights violations. Your unwavering commitment to these critical issues serves as a beacon of hope for those in need and sets a commendable example for others to follow.

Thank you, John, for your invaluable contributions to the advancement of human rights and the ongoing battle against corruption. Your selfless dedication and tireless advocacy are truly commendable, and I am grateful for the positive impact you are making in our society.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
Very helpful at the time I needed help the most. Very understanding and up on all court issues I had. Thanks Mr.Robert John
He turned down my case because it wasn’t his speciality but he still gave me advice for further action! Thanks Robert!

He is as amazing and professionally as they come. Yes, he might be expensive, but he does the job right. Ended up getting 2 of my 3 charges dismissed and the other one was amended to a lesser charge. Highly recommend, hopefully I won’t need him again.
Amazing!! They are helping us put a slime ball of a person where they belong.
Proactive. Listens to client.
This is a no-nonsense firm, straight forward and helpful. Not padding her pocket either.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you - happy to be of service.

reviews.text: Spendy at 400 an hour but they are good and you get what you pay for
This is a well established and experienced local, women-owned, family law office.

Margaret and her staff made my divorce seem not nearly as overwhelming as I thought it would be. She handled everything professionally, timely, and I could not have asked for a better lawyer in my time of need.  I highly recommend Margaret, Ashley, and the entire team.
Expert, thoughtful, thorough, expeditious service. They're the best and worth every penny.
Great personal service with empathetic and understanding people.

Divorce is emotionally tasking. I had the privilege of hiring Margaret Rogers and staff to handle mine. Greatest decision I could have made. Professional, responsive, and most importantly they work with and for you. I could not have asked for greater family court representation. Thank you Margaret and team!

-Tim
Thourough and frienfly
The staff here are wonderful and for helpful and patient while working with you not just for you.
Very thorough.  Good experience with them.

Margaret was amazing. Every step of the way she made sure I was well informed, understood the possible outcomes, and has my complete confidence both in court and as a resource when making legal decisions.
Margaret was incredibly rude.  She made me feel as though I had to defend myself to her.  I would not recommend seeing this firm.  Between office staff to attorney I did not feel welcomed.
Gail returned my call and offered information that was helpful in my interest.  She took time to advise me even though she was to busy at the time for my need.
Ms. Ballou is professional, responsive, and extremely knowledgeable in matters of real estate.   I would highly recommend her.
Gail is WONDERFUL to do business with! She is extremely organized and speedy to get back to you. We loved working with her and would definitely recommend her to anyone.

Reside in South Carolina and had an Alaska probate process seamlessly handled by this office.  A simple internet search led me to call Gail and felt confident we were in good hands after our only phone call - the rest was handled via email & regular mail.  Clear communication, professionalism and quick responses throughout the entire process.  Highly recommend!
Good Attorney
I received incredible support and professionalism throughout the entirety of my case working with Fulk Law and would highly recommend to anyone.

Hired Mr. Fulk for help with a DVPO Long-Term Order. He successfully helped me lock it in. He and his team have been very professional, informative, and helpful through this process, and I would highly recommend him to represent you.

I hired Mr. Fulk for defense council in a civil matter, he listened to all of my concerns and provided excellent representation. At trial, Mr. Fulk successfully exposed many lies by the plaintiff thanks to his skillful cross examination, which played a key role in the outcome of the case.

All of my charges were dismissed by the judge. Afterward, he gave me great advice for next critical steps in a separate case that I am so far handling myself. Mr. Fulk will be the first attorney I call if I need assistance in the future.

I am so thankful that Fairbanks has such quality professionals like Jay Fulk and his entire team. Needing and then finding a lawyer can be overwhelming and daunting, but Jay was able to meet with me in a timely manner and then exceeded every expectation I had of the process and outcome. I would recommend Fulk Law Office to anyone looking to have the strongest representation, on your side!

Mr. Fulk and his entire staff have been wonderful to work with through very difficult custody issues. I highly recommend them to anyone, they are always clear and communicate very well, and in legal issues making sure I understand everything is very important to me!
Was scheduled to meet with them they scheduled me last minute for a consultation and then canceled the consultation the day before my trial.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ashley,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused by the cancellation of your consultation. As was communicated to you, our attorney was unexpectedly held up in court, and we had no choice but to adjust our schedule.

We did fit you into our busy schedule at the last minute since your arraignment (not trial) was quickly approaching. Once we realized the need to reschedule you, we attempted to contact you promptly to inform you of the situation and left a voicemail with options to either reschedule or cancel your consultation. Regrettably, we did not receive a response, which left us unable to finalize new arrangements in time for your arraignment date.

We understand how frustrating this experience must have been for you and deeply regret any distress it may have caused. Our goal is to provide the best possible service, and we are genuinely sorry that we fell short in this instance.

If there is anything we can do to assist you further, please do not hesitate to reach out to us directly. We value your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to serve you in the future.

reviews.text: I would like Too say mr. Jay Fulk and his Law office staff is very professional works hard and was a pleasure too have him in my side I totally recommend this Lawyer and his staff!

Fulk Law Office This lawyer was such a blessing to me he is a fighter and a winner and he took his time to explain to me to give me the comfort that I needed as he won this case for me I thank God for him

Not only professional and competent but during my entire legal experience I was followed up with on a personal basis as well. Jay Fulk is dedicated and does an amazing job. I can’t emphasize enough how this entire process was handled so well. The way legal representation should be!
Jay Fulk was super professional and I appreciate his services.

If you want the best attorney to represent you then Fulk Law Office is it! You won’t find another attorney that cares and wants to work as hard for you! He is very knowledgeable and knows the law inside and out. You will be in good hands with the Fulk Law Office!

I have worked with Jay many times on various legal issues both personal and business related. Jay consistently provides accurate, detailed solutions in a timely manner for the issues that concern me most. He is my go to for legal counsel and I believe every client is his most important client.

Jay provides the highest level of professionalism and knowledge for his clients.  His commitment to excellence in service is apparent throughout the entire process.  I highly recommend the Fulk Law Office.
Jay is very professional and responsive.  He has helped me finalize the details on a new business and he was prompt, efficient, and effective.  I Highly recommend Jay Fulk.
Jay is terrific! Very personable and professional, remains good communication with clients about case status and updates, and will fight zealously for your cause!
Very professional and knows what he’s doing!!!!!

I sat down with Mr. Sparks a few weeks ago and he was able to answer all of my questions, gave plenty of suggestions, and ensured I left knowing what my options were.

If I decide to proceed with legal action, I would not hesitate to hire Mr. Sparks.

Full disclosure he is my uncle. But he helped me out alot with legal processes I had no idea about. He put together a game plan and was very attentive throughout the court hearings. I can't recommend enough and should I need help again in the future I will 100% request his services again
Was very patient also willing to hear out what the problem was and is willing to help me with dealing with my situation with the insurance company. Thank you!

Met with Robert this week and was very happy with the sound and knowledgeable advice we got. He listened to the problem and didn't try to interrupt or talk over. He wasn't sure about a point and looked up the info so he was able to give proper advice. Would use his services again if ever needed.

Robert gave basic legal advice in a situation where I needed it most. I was unsure about the gravity of my issue or if it was worth pursuing at all. He provided a cost-effective environment for effective and useful legal counsel, and the value of the information he provided was far more beneficial than the financial cost to receive it.

I appreciate the time he took out of his day to provide me with the information I needed.
Mr. Sparks was a great help to me when I arrived in town and had issues with a scummy landlord. Effective service and very willing to fight for my rights as a tenant.

When I had an unfortunate landlord-tenant issue arise, Mr. Sparks was incredibly helpful. He was able to meet with me quickly, and provided me with sage advice over the course of almost a year. I'm very grateful for his expertise, and he helped me to resolve my case favorably!
So awesome!
He was so  helpful in getting my American Express to drop the case against me.   Highly recommend

To have my account cleared RIGHT BEFORE Christmas was a nice touch. I'm a mom of 3 and grieving over one son who I lost. I lost my job in February and have been on unemployment which just exhausted. I can't get my kids ANYTBING for Christmas cause how little I get for unemployment. But now that is out the window. When I try to call to talk to Carolyn or whatever her name is someone else answered and was not professional at all. And they hung up on me. What is going on here!?
reviews.ownerResponse: This person was never a client of my law office.

reviews.text: Forget  about my 1st review this was a bad choice
reviews.ownerResponse: Sorry that you decided to change your review Mr. Harris.  Please contact my office to further discuss if you wish.
Thank you for your rating.

reviews.text: When I needed advice to protect myself in a landlord-tenant situation, this office promptly emailed me back with options and information that I could act on to protect myself. There was no charge for this call. I am really grateful and I will most likely return to this office if I need to take further legal action or get legal advice.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your response.

reviews.text: Very rude and unorganized. Would not recommend.
This man is scum of the earth.

reviews.ownerResponse: Sorry that you are not happy with your result, but we did our best.

reviews.text: Extremely unprofessional. After I told him about my case he  !!!!!!!blackmailed!!!!!!! me into giving him a higher percentage than in the written contract. I fired him. He proceeded with MY lawsuit and took my money without my consent after I fired him!

I was looking forward to working with Mr. Covell after I was referred to him. My experience was horrifying, however, as I began to realize how disorganized and unpredictable he was. I prepared documents to help him understand my position and details regarding my case. The first time I dropped them off for him to review, he claimed I never provided to him. The next time, he barely read them in preparation for my mediation. He showed up to the zoom mediation as he was vacationing in Florida, extremely unprofessional. He acted as if he truly had better things to do than help me save my future. Again, horrifying. Lazy, rude, and almost cost me my business and my future. I don't like to leave negative reviews, but please proceed with caution when working with this firm.

Everytime I went to the office, during business hours, *random times*, the office was locked. They have a little mailbox that payments can be dropped in but in that neighborhood- no thanks. I have even waited through a lunch time waiting to see if "maybe they open after lunch at 1230", then waited still "maybe its 1pm when they open back up"... still locked. I even watched as another person pulled in, tried the door, and left.

They either need to have the office open when their website says they are open or update their hours. People just want to make payments, trying to give you money! .. just be open during business hours! Please!

Mr. Covell's knowledge of the Law is what  impressed me the most. He was kind and friendly when I was explaining my situation. He made me feel that I was not alone and that he was going to help see me thought my dilemma.  I remember Ken saying "You focus on your life I will focus on this case." He held true to that statement.
Not only does Ken know the law he knows the Judges and DA's. The outcome of my case was better than any of my exceptions.
I would recommend using Ken to any one of my friends and family for ANY of their legal needs.

Thank you Ken!
Very good layer kept me up to date on everything that concerned me and very well priced compared to other lawyers in the area that had less experience.
wanted to charge EIGHT HUNDRED AND FIFTY DOLLARS to represent me for a $150 SPEEDING TICKET!!! not even a reckless driving or anything, just a standard 10 over on the freeway ticket!

I’m incredibly grateful for the work Rita Allee did on my custody case. She helped me retain my parental rights and ultimately secured a fair, 50/50 shared custody outcome for my sons. Her guidance saved me many thousands of dollars, but even more importantly, she helped me keep a clear head during one of the most emotionally devastating periods of my life.

Throughout the process, Rita stayed steady, strategic, and honest. She protected me from making decisions under pressure—especially while my ex was trying to manipulate me into giving up rights that mattered deeply. Her calm counsel and deep knowledge of family law made all the difference.

Because of Rita, my sons get equal time with both parents, and I get to remain a fully active father in their lives. I couldn’t be more thankful for her work and would highly recommend her to anyone facing a difficult custody or family law situation.
Just rancid

She is a terrible terrible person. Because of her my kids no longer have a father. She should be band from practicing, she will make your children suffer a traumatic AWFUL childhood. She is as scummy as they come. Save your money and the life of others! DON'T USE HER! THIS SCUMBAG HAS RUINED AN ENTIRE FAMILY AND HAS NO REMORSE!
She's very intelligent and blunt.
A great Family Law Office. Friendly, helpful  and knowledgeable staff and top notch attorneys.

I'm a disabled Gulfwar veteran. One of their staff members accused me of being on Iraq side of the war plus a number of other things.  To me having a staff member that is that disrespectful to someone  that volunteered to put themselves in harms way to protect everyone in the USA is not a very good thing.  Especially when you live and work in a military town. Looking at all of the other reviews this office  doesn't really  care. My suggestion to all of the military  community.  Is don't waste your time and money  with this office.

I was shocked to see all these negative reviews. I too had ALL these experiences with Rita. She is a thief, she takes your money, your time, and gets you NOWHERE! Every one of these negative posts are true and Un-exaggerated. She told me that young, skinny, pretty girls like myself think they shouldn’t have to pay for anything! She said, I wanted my kids poor. She took what she could get from me and dropped me as a client for not wanting to fight for land property.
I called the board and they said she has the right to drop me as a client. RIDICULOUS! Please please please save yourself the time, energy, and money and go with someone else.

Worst mistake of my life I could've probably got further if I represented myself. Terri didn't do anything for me but basically tell me that the judge most likely wouldn't let me take my daughter with me out of state due to my husband being active duty and both side of mine and my ex families live here in fairbanks. Even tho he is not stable and a druggy she basically said that he'd end up with her. Also they charge 3,000 up front and don't do anything at all they make u do everything so u pay them to sit around and look stupid. (My honest opinion) I do not recommend hiring them at all. I'm sure your would get further in your case if u represented yourself
Billed $240 for a 24 minute “consultation” she didn’t even consult and didn’t give me ANY legal advice! What a waste of time AND money. Unbelievable!!!
Great advice
Zero stars this firm should be sued for malpractice

Horrendous service. Teri Coleman was my attorney through my child custody case and she did NOTHING. Probably even less than I could’ve have done for myself. I had so much evidence against him and still my infant was trusted in his care.

Did nothing for me but show up in court as I am out of state.  After I fired her graciously she continued to bill me. I will be filing a complaint with the bar. Mysteriously my bill went from having $100 left when I let her go to -$40 in a month and now I get a bill -$280.

My mother spent all her savings helping my brother pay lawyer bills to Rita Allees firm to locate his children and ex wife. After he fired her team, he made more progress in six months then they did in two years.  My advice, do it yourself..spend that money on your babies as they will need it more than her establishment.

We went in to get advice and Rita did not sit and listen to us, but instead simply spent all but perhaps 5 minutes slowly rambling on about facts about our case that we already knew and other generic information = wasted time and money. When we interjected to get the issues we were concerned about on the table, she would cut us off and insist we hear her out. When we asked specific questions about hypothetical outcomes and how we should proceed, she said, "I didn't go to the school of magic wands". Providing practical what-if's and solutions to those would have been GREATLY appreciated. Instead, we paid $240 for an hour (wait, only 48 minutes, 5 of which actually pertained to our concerns) of her rambling on instead of listening to and advising her paying clients on what they were truly concerned about. There should be a high level of integrity of use of one's time when your services warrant $4/minute. We got better information from websites for free by far. We paid her to give us valuable advice that we couldn't find elsewhere. This was not the case.

The front desk office manager was not the friendliest and was very defensive as well.

We would not recommend Rita. Please let our costly mistake keep you from making a similar one.
Ken helped me after I was injured by a drunk driver. He listened, answered questions, and explained things well. In the end, I was very pleased with the result. Thank you, Ken!
This guy knows his stuff! He represented me and his knowledge of the law got me and my family the settlement we deserved. Thank you Mr. Sheehan.

Absolutely terrible law firm. I would not recommend to ANYONE. Extremely unprofessional from both John Franich and Heather Brown. Very limited details on serious matters, very limited information on serious matters and very little direction on anything related to your case at all. After 2 years! of business being finished with Franich Law firm they were still trying to bill me for “invoices” not even labeled for anything. After emailing the law office back a first time, I was ignored and then was sent another invoice by the law firm. So after a 2nd time emailing and explaining how unprofessional the business was being I was told “please take our sincerest apologies, our computer systems messed up in the beginning of the year”. How a computer system sends out paper envelopes in the mail is beyond me, but It just goes to show you that no one in that office is truly paying attention to any details, it is simply a cash grab and on to the next victim.
On a side note, Abby Dillard is awesome. Helps in any way possible, just a shame the rest of the “team” is never on board.
Great Lawyer!!!! Got it done.
Organized, knowledgeable and flexible.
Mike at Cavaliere Law was great!  He did a great job setting up my trust!
Very professional and helpful, from navigating the sale of our business to writing our living will.
Unftiendly
Since 2012, I have used Mike for my estate planning.  He is excellent at the services he provides and would highly recommend him.
Mike has been extremely helpful with helping us file paperwork and review contracts & agreements to start our small business.

I've had the opportunity to work with Mike Cavaliere over the last twelve years. Mike is an experienced, bright and wonderful lawyer. He is diligent, cares about clients and provides well researched and timely work product. In short, Mike is a great lawyer.

Mike Cavaliere is an outstanding Alaskan probate and trust attorney. He is who I call when I need help with estates/trusts. Honest. Hard-working. Bills fairly. Returns phone calls. Highly recommended. - Ward Merdes
Recommended IBEW lawyer in Fairbanks. Hard working and BUSY.
Burns and associates took advantage of a disabled woman. She needed help with getting a cloud removed from a title and they took her $300 and ghosted her.  I would not to business with this company
Frank was extremely professional and comforting in a stressful situation.  It's a comfort to have someone in your side that cares and knows what he's doing.
Spaulding Law. I Highly Recommend.

I highly recommend Attorney, Frank Spaulding. Whenever you’re facing a legal challenge, the unknown’s can be very stressful. Mr. Spalding is not only an outstanding Attorney well versed in the Law, but an excellent communicator. His knowledge of the Law is unmatched, and his well timed sense of humor would bring a little light to the situation when needed. I also appreciated his availability. Always kept in contact. He Would always return my call. He’s not only an outstanding Attorney, but a really good guy. If you need an attorney in his field, I would suggest you give him a call.

Mr. Spaulding came highly recommended and I'm glad I reached out to him to represent me in my case. He is very professional and knowledgeable about the law. He was very clear and honest with his counsel and with it, I was able to navigate my case to the best outcome. I definitely recommend him for those needing legal representation.

From the moment I first talked to Attorney Spaulding until the resolution of the case, I always felt we were in the best of hands. We felt confident enough to put our entire trust in him and his legal expertise, and we were not wrong. His professionalism, knowledge, communication, and commitment to our case was second to none. We are so very glad and grateful we chose Attorney Spaulding to represent this case. We give him the highest recommendation.
Very great at communicating, very educated and kept me in the loop with everything. I even had to ask for an extension on my remand at the last minute and he promptly took care of it. Amazing lawyer.

I recently had the unparalleled experience of engaging Frank Spaulding as my attorney, who specializes in DUI cases. From our initial consultation, I was immediately struck by Frank's consummate professionalism, deep knowledge, and genuine commitment to his clients. As someone who was dealing with the overwhelming ramifications of a DUI charge, Frank was not only adept at navigating the legal intricacies, but he also demonstrated an uncanny ability to negotiate with the District Attorney, securing for me the best possible deal.

Living out of state post-incident added another layer of complexity to my situation. However, with Frank's profound understanding of the legal landscape in Fairbanks and his expansive network, he masterfully managed to meet the conditions of my unsupervised probation. Notably, the cost of his unparalleled services was a mere fraction when compared to other attorneys in the Fairbanks area.

In an arena where expertise and precision are paramount, Frank Spaulding stands head and shoulders above the rest. I wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone in need of legal representation, especially in DUI cases. His approach not only saved me financially but also provided a beacon of hope during an exceptionally challenging period in my life.

Frank Spaulding's experienced and professional representation helped me navigate an extremely stressful legal situation. He was honest, efficient, communicative and very considerate throughout the entire ordeal and he successfully managed to negotiate a much better deal for me than what i was originally faced with. I cannot recommend him highly enough and while i hope to never need legal representation again, he would be the very first person i would call if i did.
I am extremely satisfied with the service of Mr. Spaulding. I would recommend him to anyone who needs help.
Gentleman I spoke with couldn't help me with my situation, but they pointed me to the direction of someone that could.   In a world full of flakes, being a stand-up individual is important.

We can’t say enough good things about Mr. Spaulding.  If you are looking for a great defense attorney, look no more.  He goes over & beyond, responds quickly, by far the most professional & knowledgeable attorney,. We couldn’t be more thankful for everything he did for us!     Thanks much Mr. Spaulding. We couldn’t have done it without your professional advice & knowledge.

Outstanding. Hands down the best defense attorney out there. I highly recommend Frank. He is responsive, professional, intelligent, and empathetic throughout the whole court process, and has your back the entire time. He looks out for your best interests and fights for the best possible outcome and gets results. Thank you again Frank for absolutely everything. I couldn't have made a better choice. You are in good hands with Frank Spaulding!

I highly recommended Frank Spaulding for an attorney. Frank did everything I have asked of him and much more. From the beginning to the end Frank has treated my family and me with nothing but respect. I could not have asked for more. If you are not sure and can't decide on an attorney pick Spaulding Law P.C.. Thank you!!!!

I cannot praise Mr. Spaulding enough. He works quickly, responsive to my emails, and transparent about the possible outcomes. Although my legal situation was a mess, I felt I was in good hands from the first time I spoke with Mr. Spaulding. He successfully had my charges dismissed. I was truly innocent and terrified for my future. I would highly recommend Mr. Spaulding to anyone needing a criminal attorney.

I recently retained Mr. Spaulding for a Incident I was involved in. I was very worried, and I did not know what to expect before my 1st hearing. Mr. Spaulding made me feel alot more informed and less on edge throughout the process.

Mr. Spaulding let me know every detail that was going on in my case as it was unfolding, he told me what my options were and informed me of all the laws, and info I needed so that I could make the best possible decision for myself in my case.

Mr. Spaulding is a very knowledgeable attorney who puts alot of time and effort into his clients, and I highly recommend!!
Frank kept me in the loop on everything going on, and was able to work out a deal with the prosecution that was very amicable! It was a pleasure working with him, and worth every cent.

Franklin Spaulding stands out from the crowd.  I had to retain Franklin's services recently for two criminal charges I was facing.  I had tried to retain the services of another lawyer in town and was left with a bitter taste in my mouth after the treatment I received, 4 days and $1,000 later and I still had not spoken directly to my lawyer.  Immediately upon meeting Mr Spaulding I felt I was in good hands.  He was upfront, direct,  honest, and though I was very stressed at the time he gave me a sense of relief.  I may not have known what the outcome of my case would be but I was confident I was in good hands and had a genuinely good person in my corner.  Franklin was quick to respond to my texts,  he emphasized that the decisions were mine to make but always gave his opinion, this made me feel like I had taken some control from a situation that had me feeling helpless.  My case was dismissed shortly after retaining Mr Spaulding's services, though this may not always be the case he returned 90% of the retainer I gave him and only charged me for the time he had put in, he would have been well within his rights to keep it all.  In a sea of criminal defense attorneys, some less than honorable,  I would highly recommend Franklin Spaulding as a top notch lawyer and genuinely good person with a strong moral compass.

While I can say I never wanted to be in the position I was put in to. Having Mr. Spaulding on my side made the whole legal process much easier. He is extremely professional, personable, reliable, and sharp when it comes to criminal law.

Mr. Spaulding is beyond professional and diligent when providing his expertise and assistance. Best in town from what i've gathered! When I was looking around as to which attorney I was going to hire to represent me, after talking with Mr. Spaulding the choice was clear.
He always kept me up to date with any and all details that I needed to be aware of and always made it a so that I understood and knew about all my rights and options.

I would highly recommend his expert service to anyone confidently knowing that he would help and take it upon himself to address any case with the upmost importance, seeking the best possible outcome for any client he represents.

Thank you!
Frank Spaulding is an invaluable resource; he has provided trusted counsel in times of my family's varied legal needs.
Excellent lawyer.  Very responsive and skilled in the courtroom.

Spaulding Law has drawn up several legal documents for my company and I couldn't be more pleased.  I simply told Frank what I was needing to do and in a very reasonable amount of time, he produced exactly what I needed.

I'm so appreciative of Mr. Spaulding's assistance with a sensitive legal matter. He was kind and understanding while representing my best interests. The case was resolved quickly and to my benefit. Thank you!
Frank is an experienced trial attorney who is a relentless advocate and  always goes the extra mile for his clients.  I would highly recommend him to my family and friends.

Attention ！Attention ！Attention ！Everyone, please be careful with this law firm.
I received a speeding ticket and went to consult them, hoping to get some help. They charged me $500 just for a 15-minute conversation—about 10 minutes were spent chatting about my trip and other unrelated topics, and only 5 minutes were used to understand my ticket. After that, they told me that if I wanted them to fully handle the case, I would need to pay an additional $2,500.
Honestly, I was so angry I could only laugh.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We respectfully disagree with the characterization of your consultation and believe it is important to clarify a few points for the benefit of future readers.

Our firm's standard consultation fee is $500. This fee is clearly and thoroughly explained before any appointment is scheduled and again during intake, specifically so there are no misunderstandings about cost or scope. In fact, for traffic citations, our staff routinely advises prospective clients to consider whether the consultation fee alone is worth it, as the fine for a ticket may sometimes be less than the cost of consulting an attorney. Many people ultimately choose to handle traffic matters themselves for that reason.

That said, some individuals nevertheless request a legal consultation —particularly when there are concerns about collateral consequences such as impacts to a commercial driver's license, insurance implications, or when a citation is issued in a remote jurisdiction, which is common in Alaska. In those situations, clients may reasonably decide that professional legal guidance is worth the expense.

During consultations, including yours, we spend substantially more than 15 minutes reviewing the citation, discussing potential legal and collateral consequences, and explaining available options. This necessarily includes understanding the surrounding circumstances, as context is often legally relevant. We also provide a detailed explanation of the work required should the firm be retained, along with the associated fee. A quote of $2,500 to handle a contested traffic matter reflects the time, responsibility, and professional obligations involved in representing a client-not merely the act of appearing in court.

Finally, we make it clear to everyone who consults with us that we are here to help regardless of whether they hire our firm. All individuals who meet with us receive guidance on next steps for their case, even if they ultimately choose to proceed on their own.

We regret that you left feeling frustrated, but we stand by our transparency, our pricing, and the value of the professional legal services we provide.

reviews.text:
Not worth the money
Wish there was a way to give 0 or negative stars
Only good thing about the office is nice receptionist that answers the phone, definitely underpaid
Does not like when you question him, can never admit that he is wrong
Bully
Unethical

I have known Bill for decades and have this to say:  Not even the best lawyer in Alaska can make a silk purse out of a sows ear.  That is every lawyer's problem, but most failing clients refuse to see it.

I paid 5000$ a completely ripped off for a reckless driving ticket. I was active duty, and she used my concern just to take free money. She didn't do absolutely anything on my case. NO reduction no driving school. She never made a deal with the prosecutor,  just took my money and let the judge decide. They suspected my license, of course! 5000$ on the trash.  I could easily make a deal with the court and save my money. Was my first and only ticket! 🗑 don't go there!. They simply don't care. The place is old and they are money hungry! Hope karma hit that 🧙‍♀️
Mr. Satterburgh did an exceptionally great job with my case. I wish I could give a 10 star review.
A bit pricey but you get what you pay for and is the best in town.
You get what you pay for.
Just don't. $400 dollar consultation.

I usually don't comment or review things but I had a weird experience with this firm. I only called for a question and right off the bat I told them if they were busy or didn't have time for my question I understood. They said go head and ask, then they told me they weren't a lawyer and couldn't answer my question. They passed my information to a lawyer who got back to me. The lawyer called me back just to tell me off a little and tell me to research my question. The lawyer and receptionist asked me a dozen times total if I lived in Fairbanks Alaska( I guess they get calls from people that don't stay here all the time). I can't speak for the other firms in the area, but from other Google comments it seems to be a common run in.
A very good law firm and very attentive.

Outstanding customer service, very professional and knowledgeable staff who truly care about their clients. No one else in town I would trust to handle my legal matters. If you get in trouble, though I don't hope you will, just call Bill!
Only people I trusted.

Mike Kramer is bright, honest and a fighter. He returns calls and (unlike many attorneys) actually thinks ... before he speaks. As a plaintiff personal injury attorney, Mike Kramer NEVER quits. He is also busy. BOTTOM LINE: You will be in good hands if you can get Mike Kramer to represent you. - Ward Merdes
Extremely kind and helpful. They provided very good advice and took the time to guide us.

Responsive professional effective handled my case while I was in another state quickly without need to go further to court. Thank you for your care to listen to my concerns and to find quick effective resolution.

I deeply appreciate your exceptional help and professional service and for being a reliable source of support. I highly recommend your services to anyone seeking assistance.Thank you Italia and God blessed.

We have been in the real estate investing business for over 40 years in Fairbanks Alaska.  Ms Carson is one of the best and most knowledgeable and caring attorneys that we have ever known we would highly recommend her and Polaris law group for anyone seeking help in the real estate realm.

Atty. Italia is beyond professional and wonderfully personal.  She immediately reassured us and organized our case quickly.  We couldn't have found a better representative to handle our case.  The portfolio they built and the document processing was perfect.  The communication was constant. She even attended my interview in anchorage.  Our case was a success through her efforts.  I highly recommend that anyone with immigration issues to consult with her.  Thank you so very much Polaris law firm and,especially Italia!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting us with your legal matter.  Please let us know if we can help you again in the future.

reviews.text: Went above and beyond to ensure we got our voice heard in our lawsuit.  I highly recommend this law group if you ever need a good lawyer!  During the whole ordeal we felt we were her only client, that is the focus she gives your case.  Greatly appreciated!

We recently used the Polaris Law group to prepare our will and revocable trust. Marc Smith the attorney based Iin Delta did a great job of educating us on every aspect of the process while guiding us through to completion. Our removable trust is now completed and on file at the probate office in Fairbanks. I would highly recommend this law group, specifically Marc for anyone considering  a will and/or trust!
Debra Fortune

Italia Carson and her law group are highly recommended as they gave us helpful advice on our situation and helped us through the process of receiving a work authorization card and a green card in addition to all the little things. They were thorough, professional and responsive and if we ever needed assistance in the future we would definitely go directly to them - Thank you Italia and Polaris, we are so grateful!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words. Please let us know if we can help you in the future for your immigration needs.

reviews.text: Very knowledgeable and understanding of what my needs were. Cannot express enough gratitude for helping me through my situation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words about the legal services you received in our new Delta Junction office!

reviews.text: Polaris Law Group provided exceptional service throughout my naturalization process.   The communication was prompt with timely updates, and personalized attention. Excellent experience with Ms. Italia Carson and Mr. Marc Smith. Highly recommend!

I am completely happy with the legal services I received from Polaris Law Firm. Italia was amazing very knowledgeable and informative to my needs. I would highly recommend them for anyone needing legal services
We retained Polaris Law Group for several situations from wills to citizenship.  We are very pleased with the services rendered.

Marc Smith of Polaris Law Group was excellent with his representation of a hybrid case. His in-depth case law research was impeccable. Mr. Smith listened and improvised. He was confident and presented a seamless argument in front of the Judge. I would highly recommend Mr. Marc Smith.
I was very pleased with their service highly recommend easy to work with. Made me feel very conferable.

Ms. Italia Carson was absolutely wonderful. She is professional, stays on top of your case, notifies you at all times of what is going on with your case extremely proficient !  Such a pleasure to work with and if I ever need to take care of any business she and her law firm is my go to. I have friends in Alaska and have already sent her contact to them so that they now have it.
Thank You Italia for all of your Help could not have done this without you and you made it easy for me.
Salute to Polaris Law Group for their service helping with our real estate issue.
Polaris Law Group provided exceptional service, responded to our questions in a timely manner, and offered competitive rates. I highly recommend them if you are looking for legal services.

Polaris Law group was great at handling my case.  My case was a little different than their other cases, because everything had to be done abroad.  They made sure i sent all the proper paperwork and documentation, which resulted in my daugther getting her American Citizenship.  I will recommend Polaris Law Group to everyone, they are very patient with the customers and they understand the challenges that you are going thru.  No matter the challenges, Ploaris Law Group can get you the answers and the help you need.  Excellent Service.
It is the best lawyer office.

Love Polaris Law Group!

Italia was the best! Polaris Law Group communicated with us in every step of the way and kept us updated on the progress. I was a DACA recipient married to a US citizen (military) and I had been trying to apply for Parole in place but failed until Italia helped us. She made it sooo easy and we got my parole in place in just a few months and my Green Card right after!
If you’re having immigration problems do not hesitate to visit Italia!

Thank you so much!

My husband and I had a scheduled consultation at 1 pm on Saturday, Oct. 28th. PLG wanted to do this meeting via Zoom. We were told they would be sending a link for the meeting. 1pm came and went. Was not sent a link, nothing. My husband call PLG and got a receptionist. This was 1:30. This individual did not take my husband's name or number. She said she would send a message to the group and they would call us back.   230 and no phone call. My husband called again, he gets another person he stated the same thing, only thing he could do was se d an urgent message and someone would get back to us. He couldn't tell us when we'd expect a call. We never got a call back period. Disappointing that this is how PLG conducts business. We were looking forward to the meet and getting g answers. Not happy.
reviews.ownerResponse: Our onboarding is automated to accommodate the high number of requests we receive for free consultations. We do not offer free initial consultations on weekends. We are sorry you had difficulties setting up an online free consultation via our website link and amswering service. Best of luck with your legal representation.

reviews.text: Professional, friendly and flexible!

One of the best law firms in alaska matter of fact, it's outstanding law firm regardless of where you are they are always willing to answer questions outstanding people Outstanding law firm will recommend them to everyone

Ms. Carson is a No- Nonsense lawyer who is very transparent with the process. She makes sure you are aware and communicated about where your paperwork is at, what state and what kind of issue you are currently looking at and how it can be dealt etc., I was able to get my temporary green card process expedited in months, while the typical wait times are in years now. I was also able to get my work authorization expedited and this all came with no additional charges. (other than the cost of forms and paperwork itself). Polaris is probably the best bet when it comes to immigration attorney in town. They are very honest with the work they do.
Great experience creating an LLC.

My initial consultation was extremely helpful and informative! Ms. Carson is wonderful, very honest and direct, and gave me resources for my case that are very useful. I would recommend her legal services to anyone in need of an honest, caring, and extremely knowledgeable attorney.
Great job.  Excellent service.

Long overdue review here...some time ago I had a consultation with Ms. Italia Carson regarding immigration law. The consultation was spot on and I'm attesting to this law firm's integrity and veracity with their law service. 5 stars all the way!

My wife and I began our search for an immigration lawyer in 2020 through my wife's determination in the search it lead us to Polaris Law Group.  Let me tell you that we have never been more happy with the service and representation we received Ms Carson helped us fill out the whole application process and did not keep us in the dark at all she always updated us on the any movement or approval made on our case and now everything was approved and My wife has her GC!!!!!!!!.  there are just no words to describe how amazing Ms Carson is and I would definitely recommend anyone in the Alaska area use her as representation hands down the best there is.

I found Polaris Law Group in 2020 after sifting threw tons of immigration lawyers in different states. I was overjoyed when I found them in North Pole. After making contact, I hired Ms.Carson for my case as she was affordable. Helped me through the application process, keep me updated on every step and never left me in the dark. She was very informative, caring and friendly. I could not have found a better Attorney and will forever be grateful for everything she has done.  I am proud to say I have a 10yr Greencard.  Thanks a million!! I recommend anyone in need of a immigration lawyer to choose the Polaris Law Group.
Best lawyer around! Helped me so much!
reviews.ownerResponse: We are so happy to have been able to help you get your green card!

reviews.text:
Polaris Law Group at North Pole, Alaska provided excellent immigration legal services.  Polaris Law Group and Italia at North Pole, Alaska helped make our legal immigration process quick and GREAT!!!
Thank you all so much, We appreciate your services!!!  God Bless The USA!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Cody and Misaki! You're one of our superstar green card cases that USCIS approved in 7 months!

reviews.text:
Ms.Carson did my residency paper, she and her staff is very attentive, very detailed, very patient , kind most importantly they will give you every detail and update of your status.

We love everything about Polaris Law Group P.C

We highly remember them to any who is filling their status
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Sherwin and Jimmy. We were so happy to get help you get your Green Card in 5 months! That's our best record yet!

reviews.text: They are amazing and helped me so much.

We are so happy with our experience with Polaris Law Group's immigration services for our spousal visa case.  We don't live in Alaska, but we were able to easily communicate with them about our immigration.  Our attorney kept us informed about our case and answered all our questions.  Our immigration case was so strong, for us, it was approved by USCIS in 9 months!  We could not have figured out the complicated process through both Homeland Security and the the State Department without their expert advice and tireless dedication. We highly recommend their immigration services for anyone in or outside Alaska.
Italia did a fantastic job for us! We would definitely use her services again. She was informative, prompt and very thorough. Highly recommend!

I met with Italia for 10 minutes and not only did she answer my questions but was willing to look at something and responded right away.  I so do appreciate her willingness to help me and offer her professional expertise without cost to my organization.  Thank you, thank you!!

Polaris Law Group was able to help me settle a challenging issue that I was having with my ex, in a secure and quick manner.  They explained details to me that I didn't understand and explained step by step what they were doing and the hoped for outcome.  They also explained what would happen if we did not get the outcome that we were looking for.  What a positive experience, for my first time in working with a law group.  Two thumbs up.  👍👍
Friendly, knowledgeable, and accurate advice. Highly satisfied with their work.

Italia is the BEST!! She helped me, explained everything very well and was fast! I recommend anyone to her as she is good at what she does and is very professional. Thank you Italia!! I appreciate you!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Ms. Hernandez. Please let us know if we can assist you again in the future.

reviews.text: I highly recommend Polaris Law Group in North Pole, Alaska.  Very professional, answered all my questions plus helped me in putting my will together with issues I never thought of.  Plus the firm's military background is a plus for understanding veteran issues.

Answered all my questions an was able to help me figure out everything I was wanting to know, ontop of giving me the advice I was looking for. I highly recommend them for any financial advice or help you may need an are unsure of. I couldn't have picked a better place, that's my true honest opinion, an I rarely ever leave a review anywhere, but they really do deserve every star. An they will be who I come back to for anything down the road an who I will recommend to family an friends.

For over a year my brother that lives in the outer Fairbanks area had been dealing with a probate issue after the sudden death of his wife. Through my employer we have a nice Employee Assistance Program benefit which allows us to receive legal advice through a referral service from CLC Legal Access Plan. After one simple call they supplied me with just one contact, Italia Carson with Polaris Law Group in North Pole Alaska. She listened to the many many questions I could toss her way during the 30 minute consultation, of which she patiently went well past. She made me feel very comfortable in going forward to recommend her to help with my brothers needs and to get his probate issues taken care of. Italia was able to supply my brother with all the necessary paperwork to get all of his accounts, title and deeds in order in just a few short days.
I don’t generally recommend people I have never personally met but Italia Carson and her Polaris Law Group I certainly would. Should you have any need for legal services in the North Pole or Greater Fairbanks area please give them a call, especially Italia Carson.

Thank you so much for your assistance.
Dan J

We were preparing for a hearing in a probate matter.  We called for information on how to proceed.  The information we received was spot on and enabled us to proceed successfully. Information was given very professionally and courteously .

I went into a debt consolidation which the contract really wasn't clear,  I talked to Italia and she was so helpful, she listen to what I wanted and then took the contract apart and explained everything to me.  I felt relief from something that had been bothering me for quite some time and now, the only stress I had is gone.  There are so may other situations she can help you with and she is really easy to talk to.   All you have to do is fill out one of the questionnaires on their website (The easiest way to get a response) and they will take care of the rest.

Professionalism, attention to detail and persistence is the best way to describe my experience with Polaris Law Group, PC. Italia Carson helped our business transition into an S-Corp from start to finish. They went above and beyond our expectations. Took the time to answer all my concerns, questions and made the process seamless. Highly recommend!
I appreciated my lawyers competence and knowledge.  She helped me with everything!  Everything was done in a timely manner as well.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Ms. Krejci! It was a pleasure assisting you with your estate planning needs.  We appreciate your business and any referrals you can send our way. ~PLGPC

reviews.text: Refusing to provide servics to people with disabilities. Being completly rude to people who really need help!!!!! Disgusting company!!!!
They never call or help you
I very much appreciate how extremely helpful that entire office has been in a very traumatic situation I'm going through  Good People !!!
Must be good....got to get on a list
Amazing Attorneys and Staff
Called this place trying to file for disability. Not a disability attorney?
Need this Lawyer,help,me.Im born and raised in Alaska,worked hard my whole life.Got hurt at work,WMC,Ha,Ha,a joke= My Life ,Gone.
Great attorney.. surely helped my wife... the best I have worked with.. explains everything.. thanks Paul..
Ask them to file some paperwork and they never did. I ended up with a 2,000 dollar bill and they failed to follow through with the work.

We wanted a few minor changes to our Trust. We had a meeting and went over the changes we requested. We got back a draft with incorrect edits and our Trust was renamed (not what we wanted).  I cancelled the process since it was obvious we were not communicating and we would be racking up more charges just to have the errors corrected. We then received a bill for $2,000. I paid the bill, but feel like I got ripped off.

Great job. Good customer service. They fitted us in for a meeting early and we were greeted by a welcoming receptionist, offered refreshments and seated. Hardly no wait to see the lawyer. Good advice too.

I retained the services of Steven Hansen at GSC, Inc to help me with a DUI charge. He explained my options clearly and concisely. After reviewing my case and listening to the officer’s audio recordings, Steven was able to work with the prosecuting attorney to get my charge switched to reckless driving.

I would strongly suggest using the services of Steven Hansen.
Smart, knowledgeable, understanding, and extremely professional!
We had good legal representation of our difficult real estate case. They were diligent and timely.
Great place to work!
Ringstad law office did an awesome job helping me settle after getting into an awful car accident. I 100% will use them again if ever needed and reccomend using them for your lawyer needs.

I was very nervous and clueless about how to go about hiring a personal injury lawyer.  I am so happy I went with Jason Ringstad!  Ringstad Law took care of all the overwhelming communication with different insurance companies and dealt with the subrogation issues. It was so helpful and they fought for me! I was very happy with my settlement and highly recommend going with this firm!
Jason is great!

Ringstad Law Office,PC is an award wining firm that delivers professional experienced help in your time of need. I strongly recomend them and have had excellent service throughout the entire process. Do yourself a favor and call them, I will absolutely keep their contact info .

I had a great experience working with Jason on my car accident.  He was very communicative and helpful, answered any questions I had.  He was able to secure a very fair settlement for myself and my kiddo.  I highly recommend Ringstad Law Office.

I cannot thank Ringstad Offices enough for their exceptional work in helping me secure the payout I deserved after my car accident. From the moment I walked through their doors, I felt confident that I was in the best hands possible.

Their team is incredibly professional, knowledgeable, and compassionate. They walked me through every step of the process, ensuring I understood my rights and options. They were always available to answer my questions, and their communication was top-notch.

What really stood out to me was their determination and expertise in negotiating with the insurance companies. They fought tirelessly on my behalf and ensured I received the maximum compensation for my injuries and damages. Their attention to detail and ability to navigate the legal complexities of my case were truly impressive.

Thanks to Ringstad Offices, I can now move forward without the financial stress I feared after my accident. If you’re looking for a law firm that genuinely cares about its clients and delivers outstanding results, I wholeheartedly recommend Ringstad Offices. They exceeded all my expectations, and I will forever be grateful for their dedication and hard work.

I’ll leave a forewarning saying I’m horrible at writing reviews. Working with Jason was fantastic for the duration of my troubles. I was always kept up to date on any news I needed to hear, any legal wording I didn’t understand was always explained to me in terms I could get my head around. I am thoroughly satisfied with my time here and if ever needed would definitely return.

I was in a car collision in 2021 involving a driver that did not have insurance, drivers license, or vehicle registration.  I was trying to work with my insurance company regarding this situation.  My insurance covered my totaled car; however, did not offer to assist with my medical issues.  My right hand (dominate hand) was injured.
After a month of confusion, I decided that I needed an attorney to help me out.  I reviewed the Alaska statutes regarding uninsured motorist and that is why I needed help.  I hired an attorney that is very popular with injuries but, I just did not like that attorney's attitude or demeanor.
I called Jason Ringstad office for an appointment.  I know the name because his  father is  commitment to public education and the family's outstanding contribution to our community.  Jason is an excellent attorney.  He took my case and challenge my insurance on medical treatment, pain and suffering, and lost work wages.  I am very fortunate to have selected Jason and his team for this insurance case.   The outcome was very positive and I highly recommend Ringstad Law Offices.  They are compassionate and very professional at their job.  I immensely grateful for choosing this law firm.
They helped me through all the legal red tape and get the settlement I deserve. Thank you!

Ken of Ringstad Law Offices handled both of my cases in a timely professional matter. There wasn't any up front costs KEN WILL WORK HARD FOR YOU BELIEVE THAT. RINGSTAD STAFF went ABOVE and BEYOND. Everyone in the office is very professional and nice. Everyone in the office  always had a positive attitude,  an award winning smile when they greet you.
The best attorney I have ever dealt with in my life. Best workers, they treated me like a king. Thanks to Ringstad Law Office.
The best representation anyone can ask for! A+ all the way. Highly recommended. Jason answered all my question's and went above and beyond expectations.
They couldn't help me with what I needed but were the only office in town that actually listened to me and reffered me to someone who could help me.
Mr. Ken Ringstad and his staff have made a very bad experience very pleasant & I highly recommend them for any of your personal injury needs!
Mr. Ringstad was easy to communicate with and provided excellent direction through a difficult process.  We highly recommend Paskvan and Ringstad, PC.

No one was making fun of anyone for being hard of hearing. Using that as an excuse for her being irritated with answering the phone is unacceptable from a place of business. Now I understand why your office respond to all 1 star reviews with such defensive childish behavior. I’d like to recommend a book. “How to win friends and influence people”. Take care
reviews.ownerResponse: I am glad you are going somewhere else after making fun of someone for possibly being hard of hearing.  I suspect with that attitude you will have a difficult time finding a lawyer, and you might find there are less lawyers than you think in Fairbanks, and they all charge more.  You were put on hold because we get a lot of calls and we help a lot of people.  Someone who would make fun of the disabled does not deserve our assistance, and really do not deserve anyone's assistance.

reviews.text: We paid $300 for some advice over the phone. Jason Weiner gave some good information, but relied on AI, didn't seem to understand Alaska Statute 23.05.140(d), even after asking about it by number, and was driving for most of the discussion.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Costello's claims are inaccurate. AS 23.05.140 addresses payment of all wages for hours worked due upon termination of employment. However, this was not the issue. We were talking about what constituted hours worked. We were also talking about several other issues which had nothing to do with AS 23.05.140, which I am not going to discuss so as to avoid violating the attorney client privilege even though there really is none because Mr. Costello was on the phone with the client and he waived any privilege by discussing our consultation publicly on this forum. Mr. Costello was not the client.
Yes, I did use AI to get a quick answer to the questions being asked during the consultation because the questions I was being asked were specific to where the person worked, and the client gave me no information whatsoever, no handbooks, no policy manuals, nothing to tell me what the store's policy was. I was certainly not driving when I did that, and Mr. Costello's statements are contradictory in that regard. What I saw on AI was consistent with what I know about employment law, and that was what I told them. The AI was based on an article from 2014, which was the best I could find on short notice.
They had several questions, of which payment for hours worked was only one, which I answered over a one hour consultation that cost them $300.00. They did not give me the questions beforehand, and did not ask for additional research.
People complain all the time about attorneys being unwilling to help hard working individuals that are not in the top 1% of income levels. It is reviews like this that is the reason why. I did the best I believe anyone could do with the limited information I was given and answered questions which are rarely, if ever, asked. It would not surprise me that with this kind of treatment, people like Mr. Costello will not be able to find any help at all. I am one of the few attorneys in Alaska left willing to listen to people's problems on a wide range of legal topics at a price that is amongst the lowest in the State of Alaska.

reviews.text:
Needing a lawyer is never a good thing, but having Chris on my side made all the difference. From day one to the very end, Chris and the entire team were amazing — always prompt, extremely professional, and consistently great with communication.

Their former employee, Jennifer, was also incredible during the time she worked with me on my case. Her support and dedication meant a lot.

Thank you very much for everything you did for me. I truly appreciate it.

Kristen Farleigh was very sloppy and didn't turn in any of my paperwork on time to the point that the judge denied it when she finally did! She missed half of the court hearings for various reasons! At the very end of my case when we finally reached a custody agreement the judge gave 30 days to finalize and 8 months later kristen is no where to be found..... she ghosted me and the opposing council forcing a modifier losing all ground I had gained and it cost over $3,000 for nothing!

Only lawyer in Fairbanks that’s would take on my case. Got me 50/50 custody and worth the price.
He also gave me military discount.

reviews.ownerResponse: I am not sure who this is since there is no last name.  If this individual would post their last name, I would be happy to respond.  Otherwise, I am not going to guess.

reviews.text: Jason didn't actually help me with my case but he gave me advice that other attorney's wouldn't he seems to be way affordable compared to the rest, I am considering on bringing my custody case to him in the near future because I don't know what I'm doing but Jason seems to be very professional and well educated in law, my original attorney retired. So I think I'm going to start using Jason
AMAZING service. Christopher Bodle is extremely helpful. Highly recommend this firm.

I would like to share my experience with Jason and his team, for all their hard work during one of my toughest moments in my younger years in my life. And I appreciate him for all the support that he has given me. He is one of the best gentleman that gave me one of the best advice on what I needed helped with in the moments when I needed it. I would give him (credit) if I need it during the next time around, if I socially need it. And I Thank Him And His Team’s For The Help That They Gave Me.

Thank You!

The Next Generations Will Help Deliver It On.

It has been years since using this legal team.  They made many horrible impressions though.  From not showing up to court on time, to asking for copies of documents from the other side in court they should have already had, it made a tough life situation even worse.  Weiner called me up directly one time to yell at me for having a balance with them, before even announcing who he was I might add.  Then he had the nerve to tell me he would continue to represent me out of some favor for being military.  My attorney was in and out, and at one point I was being represented by a billing person with prior paralegal experience.  Oh, the patalegal assigned to my case had left to go work for the law office representing the other side, and of course being a small town, there was a spouse to the other side's attorney working with this firm.  Maybe not illegal actions but things you would like to be made aware of that concern you that were never brought up. At one point, my attorney even advocated for the other side during a mediation session. It was completely unprofessional, undermining, and humiliating.  Do not recommend, especially for anyone with military connections.  This was just my personal experience.  I cannot attest to anyone else.
Professional,prompt,and courteous
They are the best 😁

We didn't feel that his legal opinion was incorrect but he is condescending, spoke over us and was completely unconcerned about our issue. He was clearly bothered to be on the phone with us despite being paid for his time.

Where to begin.i wanted to start a small LLC fast. I new how to do it myself, but I didn't want to deal with it and I wanted to put my time into the business and not all the legal paper work at the beginning again. $4000 and 7 months later he has barely started. I started with Chris in September 2023 and in March 2024 I left for a few lawyer. He drags his feet on everything, and overtime I call or email them to check in and see if they will start they charge me for the call or email. He dosnt do most of the work, he contracts most of it to a contractor who lives in Tennessee. She's really great but she can't get Chris to do anything either. They take big lump Somes and what ever they charge you they take out of the lump some they already have, I think that's pretty normal. But how is this person going to charge thousands of dollars and then call me back months later after I've been contracting them regularly to get this stuff done and they say "ya you are all out, we need another lump some" and he gives me an llc ein, and a rough draft of an opporating agreement that has spelling errors. Not even a state business license with it. And when i ask him to give me a waver form for my customers Chris says "oh you can do that yourself" i know i can do it myself ive done all of this before i just wanted to not have to deal with it and pay the pretty penny for you to do it. We tell them we're moving in a diffrent direction and would like our remaining balance back from the second lump some and it takes 2 months of me calling and emailing them to give me back a simple $330 for my remaining balance. They just kept saying there accounts services needed to do that and they would let them know. If you want to use him as a lawyer run. If you see Chris is a lawyer against you, cheer. Other than that Chris is a pretty strait up and nice guy. People seem to love to work for him, he even let's them dring their dogs to the office. I'd love that. He's not cheep so it's not a pay for what you get situation, but he's not ridiculously expensive either.
Mike Cavalier was knowledgeable and extremely easy to work with.
Their firm was a no show for a hearing.... Response: You didn't research very far!

Great and very attentive to details. They listen and work with you on your problems brought to them. Not pushy like some others in town. The one thing I would like to see is more communication through the processes, and money returned in a timely manner. If it wasn't for that, they would get 5 stars. I'll definitely keep using them.
Friendly , organized and skilled law office that can get the job done!
Paid for their service I didn’t know I was supposed to call them not them call me. I kept missing my appointment cause they didn’t call me. Didn’t get my money back or any serviced from them
Jason is the best person I could have ever asked to help me with my situation. There is nobody better. 10/10 would recommend
Best legal team in the Northwest ALASKA!
He's quick to collect money lacking on communication
Happy to call it as it is, was helpful on short notice and had resources to help set things straight.

Hands down BEST firm. They are the most understanding, kindest, hardworking, determined and diligent attorneys in Fairbanks. They helped me win my stressful child custody/divorce case. They took all the stress away. Now I’m living my best life. Thank you for putting your clients first and always taking care of us. 4 years later and I still celebrate the day it was finalized because that was the day our lives changed forever. Thank you from the bottom of my heart. I will always be forever grateful for you guys.
Great!

This is a true review: I am beyond happy and satisfied with the representation I had. Mr. Weiner and his legal assistants are excellent. They fought for me and I had the bogus charge against me dismissed. I felt that they took my concerns seriously. Mr. Weiner or his legal assistants communicated with me almost every day. My emails were answered right away. They listened to me and seemed to understand the emotional stress I was going through. I was well informed throughout the process. Also, Mr. Weiner’s experience allowed him to offer many ways to fight the bogus charge against me.

I had almost lost all hope and was depressed until I switched attorneys and made the call and talked to Mr. Weiner. After he listened to my predicament, within one minute, he offered several smart defense strategies. He explained everything thoroughly and gave me realistic hope. He worked with me and for me and the charge against me was dropped. I will recommend Mr. Weiner to my friends or family if they need a good, experienced attorney. I hope this review helps someone when they are trying to find the best lawyer to fight for them.

In June 2018 I was accused of a DUI. A few days after I called Gazewood & Weiner to represent me. They were quick to get me in for a consultation and made me feel more at ease about my situation. Jason Gazewood and his staff communicated with me extremely well through a long 10 months of my case. In April 2019 we went to trial and I was found not guilty. Gazewood & Weiner are some of the most amazing, caring lawyers out there. I can't say enough good things. Honest, reliable, professional, and get the job done. I would recommend them 100%
I would recommend this office for any law needs. I have used Mr. Weiner for multiple things both personal and business and the staff is always nice and courteous.
I called to ask how long a dissolution usually takes as the court can't offer legal advise... and the lady said we wouldn't be able to help you with that, we do divorces here.. bye.. . click...
They treat employees like garbage, and don't send out W-2's when they are supposed to be sent out. Which is weird, considering they practice law.
He does the job and wins.
When you need legal Assistance, stop here first...
Mike Stepovich represented me VERY well in court on more than 1 occasion. I highly recommend him as an attorney.

If you need an attorney in Alaska. You came to the right place. Innovative, brilliant and with her feet on the ground, Ms. Brown feels the pulse of the community and is the best representation Alaskans can have. We are blessed to have her.
Mamie is so lovely to work with, she is kind, empathetic, caring and her services are affordable for the average person who needs a little bit of legal guidance. I would highly recommend her.
Great shrimp tempura in the Asst. AG's lounge.
Highly recommend these guys! Everyone is always nice and understanding. And they will help anyway they can.

Had a case handled by Eric and he constantly had poor / late communication and was clearly way overbooked. He only called one person on our witness list while letting the opposing party take up the whole time in court calling their witnesses, only showed a a few of many exhibits that were entered to him for the case, and stood idle by while clear lies were being stated by the other party which inevitably lead to him losing the case. After complaining to Eric myself about the lack of communication and lack of help after he lost the case (while he was still our attorney) all he had to say was “the court said both parties did really good”.  The last papers he filed informing the court he was no longer our attorney he spelt my wife name wrong and put wrong information.
They did an absolutely awesome job on our estate planning documents.  Highly recommend them.  Very thorough, polite and professional.
Eric Ringstad was prompt, communicative and effective in his negotiations.  I would recommend him to any of my friends.

Since ownership changed the service has been horrible.
I received hardly any updates on my cases and on one basically nothing was done but a letter to the defendant, but they made sure to charge me an arm and a leg .
My other case was never completed with what Eric the attorney had said he would do .
I explained I was a seasonal worker and that I would pay my bill but it would be over time but they gave me weekly calls to get their money for their poor job .
I will not use this firm again.
They weren't able to help in my situation, but were friendly.
Needed honest help in a dis-honest divorce.

Meeting this group was all by chance and it was the best thing to happen. You won’t meet a more professional place to give you the help you need. They will give you the best legal and realistic path to obtaining a solution in a time you need clarity and direction most. Your money will not be wasted. Your time is valuable. You will be treated as a human being instead of a number.

The professionalism at their firm is impressive. But not only are they professional, they listen and have a personal touch to clients needs. If a situation arises that is difficult they find solutions through networking and the years of experience in the office. I totally trust the attorneys in their office with life’s most important legal challenges.
Dependable, Professional, Hard Working, Intelligent, Integrity and Ethical.  Recommend this EXCELLENT Law Firm! Cristine Beistline

My time with Ms. Tallerico was an excellent and professional experience.  Amy answered all my questions thoroughly and in a timely manner. I felt that her representation greatly exceeded past firms I have used. I would highly recommend Downes, Tallerico, and Schwalm Law Firm!

Amy Tallerico Is both professional, and personal: she is down to earth, compassionate, and empathetic, yet she is fierce and knowledgeable in the court room! I highly recommend her for anyone facing difficult, emotional cases who need a supportive and skilled lawyer!

I appreciate all the dedication and respect that Amy and her staff have shown me, and my family, over the last couple years. They are very knowledgeable and informative. I would highly recommend for anyone who is seeking legal needs

Thank you to Amy and the wonderful staff at Downes, Tallerico, and Schwalm law firm LLC for a great job when we needed help with business matters. Amy is fair and understanding and always able to deliver on her word. Thank you again and we wish you guys the very best.

Amy Tallerico is an excellent choice for legal representation. We experienced an efficient and effective outcome. She is hard working, skilled and resolved the matter quickly. I would not hesitate to recommend the firm to anyone in need of solid and fair representation.

Downes,Tallerico&Schwalm are my go to law firm.
The legal work they have done for us has been timely,  professional and very responsive.
When times were tough they went the extra mile to help clear up a problem.
Thanks again Amy and  Downes, Tallerico law team.

BEST ATTORNEYS IN FAIRBANKS !!!! Caring, experienced and professional. These hardworking attorneys will definitely put in the effort for you! They have the absolute best staff and customer service! I can't say enough about the attention to detail!

10/10 WOULD USE AGAIN!
They made my 2020 bearable.

Went through a simple process with the firm. It was easily and smoothly as expected. They were very responsive, the communication was clear so we knew what was expected of us and professionally answered all the questions we had. I know many others who used the firm and speak highly of the effort they put forth on the clients behalf.

This group of professionals helped me navigate both the estate of my late husband and a living will that I needed as a newly single-mother. Their compassion and professionalism made both experiences a little easier. I highly recommend this law firm for anyone looking for ethical, sensible legal counsel.
Top shelf representation. Great advise. Very happy with their services! Professional and would use them again.

An extremely dedicated, knowledgeable, and professional company. They helped me out so much and I will recommend them to anyone I know needing legal assistance.
They are always very professional, and are worth the time.
