Always making sure they are well organized, and have their information correct, and ready to have additional support, for any explanation that is needed. They go far to help you out in your case, and make sure that everything is fair in the long run.
I highly recommend this firm to anyone seeking out consultation, they will do above and beyond to help their customers.
Amy and her team are very professional and knowledgeable in everything they do. I highly  recommend their services to anyone who is looking for a legal advice.
My experience with Downes, Tallerico, & Schwalm Law Firm, LLC has been nothing but positive. Quick to respond, professional, and they have helped me resolve many legal conflicts.

Not only is Amy extremely effective, knowledgeable and understanding, but she was patient enough to walk me through the entire process and explain everything in great detail. Having an understanding of the process and an advocate so experienced with that process was of great comfort. If another issue like this came up again, Amy would be my very first phone call. I can't recommend her highly enough. You will be very happy with her services.

In the many years (I think 6 years now) I have worked with this law firm they have given our company superior service. I would not call any one else for our legal needs. Their professionalism, promptness, honesty, responsiveness  and friendliness has made it feel like I am calling a dear friend for advice and support. In times of uncertainty and conflict you want them on your side.

My experience with Downes, Tallerico, and Schwalm started off positive, but I was ultimately left severely disappointed with the quality of service/representation received and would warn others to select another firm.  The only thing that I can state that this firm excels at is generating billable hours - as they burned through nearly $9,000 in retainer without even going to trial or even arbitration.  A settlement proposal, a couple of motions/counter-motions, and one hearing to dispute those motions (to which my counsel was not adequately prepared for) consumed that entire amount.

Initially, my representation at Downes, Tallerico, & Schwalm was extremely confident and reassuring as to what the outcome of my dispute would be, until it came time to attend hearings.  At that point, their optimism disappeared and my counsel walked into the courtroom unprepared.  Be warned - you will be "sold" a high probability of a favorable outcome, but once they have that retainer, that stance will dissipate.

In addition, the quality of written products received was lacking, especially at the price point that I was billed.  You will receive blatantly regurgitated products, but will be billed hours as if the paralegal had to research it and write it from scratch.  This went to the extent of being billed for their time to correct their own blatant errors that I identified during a review of products.  I disputed that billing and it was partially reduced, but not eliminated.

Lastly, my counsel was frequently unavailable and my case was covered by other attorneys or paralegals in the office.  During those times, I would have to provide "catch up" information to get those people up to speed - and I was of course billed for their time.

Not bad people - just bad service.  Take your money elsewhere.
They really care about their clients!

I used these guys to help form my company and assist along the way in legal hurdles, they give good, pragmatic advice I can understand and relate too. They have always been timely with contractual obligations I’ve needed to fulfill. Plus, it’s really nice to have an attorney willing to take a spur of the moment phone call to answer a quick question.
Great work!
Oh well maybe some other lawyer will help.

If you want a lawyer who will be in your corner during a divorce...DO NOT go to this law firm.  If you want your divorce taken care of in less than a year...DO NOT use this law firm!!  If you are expecting your lawyer to keep his word and do what he says he will in a timely manner...DO NOT USE THIS LAW FIRM.

The lawyer I hired from this firm was very unresponsive to numerous calls about my case.  I paid a lot of money for this professional help, but when the lawyer says we have 10 days to respond, but refuses to return my calls for two weeks and missed the deadline, one can't help but feel my money was completely wasted; I am extremely disappointed with the service I received.
Great and honest lawyers who care about their clients!
I have had great experiences working with Jason for a while now. Very responsive. I would highly recommend this firm!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Kate!

reviews.text: Trusted and responsive.  I can't see why there are negative reviews.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the feedback, Drew.  It is much appreciated!

reviews.text:
When you need an attorney is when it really matters who shows up. My experience, unfortunately, had me frantic to hire an attorney to protect my best interest as well as my resources. I had more than 5 experiences with consultations, payments and contracts prior to scheduling with Burglin & Doxey. I sincerely would have preferred that I began with this firm.

What I appreciated throughout my experience has been Mr. Doxey's transparency, responsiveness, thorough explanations, knowledge and experience in supporting my informed decision making process to navigate a situation where I am having to trust strangers to help me through a legal situation. I appreciate that Mr. Doxey didn't sugar coat nor glaze over potential complications.

I noticed a review that said Mr. Doxey was ...nastiest man, blah blah...my goodness, thanks for that review, as that is exactly what I want from an attorney I hire and have working for my best outcomes, though not once did I experience that.

I can not convey enough positive feedback, all of my interactions with staff at Burglin & Doxey have been professional, personable and pleasant. Save yourself the headaches, start here!

10 out of 5 Stars, in my opinion.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Jennifer! We're happy that you're pleased with our services!
Hello Mr. Wick. While we appreciate legitimate feedback, I note that you are not a client of our firm, nor have you ever met anyone at our firm. Best wishes. - Jason Doxey

reviews.text: Jason Doxey is a first class Attorney and we are grateful for his representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Brett.  We appreciate your feedback!

reviews.text: Nastiest man I have ever dealt with
reviews.ownerResponse: While we strive to always treat the opposing party with dignity, we understand that emotions by the losing party can run high when our client prevails in a legal dispute.  Now that our client's case against you is concluded, we wish you well in your future endeavors.

reviews.text: Burglin and Doxey is a outstanding firm
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the feedback Mr. Fenwick!

reviews.text: Jason Doxey destroyed my child custody case.  I asked him and his office for months before my court hearing if they got my witness list in and submitted and I was told and even emailed yes but the day of court come to find out this was the 1st time he ever forgot not to put one in for a client and mine did not get put in so needless to say I didn't have a case to present and I had to sit there as all her witnesses lied and said only part of the story. So needless to say she got everything even after getting caught in a lie on the stand. Why because I didn't have anyone at all to testify on my behalf. They also still have the audacity to try and bill me another $5,000. After Jason and or his office is the one at fault for not being able to properly represent me at trial as I was paying him for. Also after my trial that he failed in he dropped me as a client and wouldn't help me anymore. He knew he was my last chance for the best for my kids and he totally dropped the ball.
This office is awesome.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the positive feedback, Caitlin.  I am glad we could be of service!
Hello Mr. Dan.  While we appreciate legitimate feedback, I note that you are not a client of our firm, nor have you ever met anyone at our firm.  Best wishes.  - Jason F. Doxey
